programme.title: Allah Rakha
programme.desc: Street urchin Allah Rakha discovers that his parents are alive and that the family was separated by a mafia don. He sets out for revenge.

programme.title: Aag Se Khelenge
programme.desc: Shekhar teams up with Johnny to fight Zaka's empire. But when he discovers Ravi Saxena died months ago, everything he believed about his ally - and their mission - starts to unravel.

programme.title: Kasoor
programme.desc: Shekhar hires Simran as lawyer, she falls for him, unaware of his intentions.

programme.title: Bal Hanuman
programme.desc: The movie traces Lord Hanuman's mischievous childhood, highlighting his many adored and celebrated antics.

programme.title: Taaqat
programme.desc: A group of commandos seek revenge as Brigadier Singha, the Chief of Indian Army, is killed by Dong, a ruthless terrorist.

programme.title: Maha Sangram
programme.desc: Vishal, a farmer, sends his brother, Arjun, to the city for higher education. However, when Arjun falls in love with a girl in the city and gets murdered by her father, Vishal seeks revenge.

programme.title: Aa Ab Laut Chalen
programme.desc: An ambitious youth who goes to the US to try his luck is caught in a love triangle with a luckless friend and a spoilt, rich kid.

programme.title: Naseeb
programme.desc: After striking it rich with a lottery win, Namdev's friend betrays him by framing him for murder. Now, Namdev must clear his name and seek justice. What a twist!

programme.title: Khatron Ke Khiladi
programme.desc: Balwant seeks revenge after his brother's death, slipping into crime. His children, heartbroken by his change, take it upon themselves to stop him and restore the man they once knew.

programme.title: Muqabla
programme.desc: Two brothers find themselves jobs in the police department, when difference arise between them personally and professionally.

programme.title: Hatya
programme.desc: Sagar helps a street boy, unaware of the storm ahead. When the boy's mother is found murdered, Sagar becomes the prime suspect, forced to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Maseeha
programme.desc: Krishna and Shiva unite against the ruthless gangster Surajbhan, whose terror touched both their lives. Together, they vow to bring justice and end his reign of fear.

programme.title: Hameshaa
programme.desc: In a twist of fate, Yash kills Raja out of love but finds himself reborn years later. Now, he encounters an older version of himself, sparking unexpected memories and emotions.

programme.title: Kabzaa (1988)
programme.desc: Ravi's heart changes after Ali saves him, leading him to fight Veljibhai.

programme.title: Maharaja
programme.desc: Kohinoor is back to reclaim his kingdom, but things get messy when Ranbir kidnaps his nanny. Can Kohinoor rescue her and secure his throne? Adventure awaits!

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Insp. Chulbul Pandey is transferred to Kanpur, where don Bachha Bhaiyya rules.

programme.title: Ek Rishta- The Bond of Love
programme.desc: Ajay steps up to shield his family from the wicked schemes of his brother-in-law, diving headfirst into danger to keep his loved ones safe and sound.

programme.title: Zakhmi Sipahi
programme.desc: Shakti, an honest police officer, sets out to avenge his father's death. Along the way, he faces numerous trials and tribulations that test his courage, resolve, and sense of justice.

programme.title: Pardes
programme.desc: Kishorilal arranges his westernized son's marriage to Ganga, brought from India to the USA, where Ganga forms a deeper connection with Kishorilal's foster son, Arjun.

programme.title: Insan
programme.desc: Amjad and his mother joyfully welcome estranged brother Munna home, unaware he is Azhar Khan, a dangerous extremist whose return brings hidden threats to their lives.

programme.title: Barsaat (1995)
programme.desc: Badal and Tina's love faces major hurdles when her dad disapproves and unjustly locks Badal up for a crime he didn't commit. Can their love survive this tough situation?

programme.title: Tirchhi Topiwale
programme.desc: Opposed lovers, Maya and Raj, find their paths when her parents' chosen suitor falls for someone else.

programme.title: No Entry
programme.desc: Faithful husband Kishan faces constant suspicion from his wife Kaajal. His friend Prem, a habitual cheater, introduces him to Bobby, a prostitute, shaking up their moral worlds and friendships.

programme.title: Aitraaz
programme.desc: In a twisted legal battle, a man faces a sexual harassment lawsuit after his boss's wife claims he raped her. It's a tense showdown of truths as the jury decides.

programme.title: Mard
programme.desc: After a cruel betrayal, Azad, a king, is imprisoned by General Dyer. His son embarks on a quest to liberate him and restore peace to their kingdom.

programme.title: Jaal The Trap
programme.desc: Ajay kidnaps Anita, the home minister's daughter, to save his girlfriend Neha from terrorists. During the daring rescue, he uncovers a shocking secret that changes everything.

programme.title: Indian
programme.desc: DCP Raj Shekhar Azad nabs terrorist Wasim Khan, but uncovers deep police corruption involving his father-in-law. Framed for murder, he must clear his name and fight for justice.

programme.title: Jurmana
programme.desc: Inder bets he can win Rama's heart. She falls for him, unaware of the wager. A sudden twist forces her to leave, changing both their lives forever.

programme.title: Hit List
programme.desc: Starring: R. Sarathkumar,Vijay Kanishka. A demonic mask man is torturing a middle class family that practices Ahimsa and uses Vijay to unleash his satanic thoughts. Vijay avenges the mask man rivals.

programme.title: Chup: Revenge of the Artist
programme.desc: Starring: Sunny Deol,Dulquer Salman. Lonesome florist and new love and a psychopath targeting critics in Mumbai. Inspector Arvind Mathur and Dr. Zenobia investigate the possible connection.

programme.title: Cycle Kick
programme.desc: Cycle Kick

programme.title: Yudhra
programme.desc: Starring: Siddhant Chaturvedi,Sarthak Khurana. Orphaned young man with anger issues joins police, exposed to crime syndicate - becomes vigilante to expose corruption.

programme.title: Big Dhamaka
programme.desc: Starring: Ravi Teja,Sreeleela. When two lookalikes from different lives fall for the same girl, things get chaotic. But a surprise link between them turns love trouble into a tangled mystery.

programme.title: Bimbisara
programme.desc: Starring: Nandamuri Kalyan Ram,Catherine Tresa. The protagonist time travels from his kingdom to the present world. The question is how and why does he do it?

programme.title: Sanam Teri Kasam
programme.desc: Sanam Teri Kasam

programme.title: Jai Simha
programme.desc: Narasimha, a hot-tempered mechanic with a heart of gold, protects an innocent family from the violent thugs of the city kingpin, Kariappan.

programme.title: Acharya
programme.desc: Starring: Chiranjeevi,Ram Charan. When Dharmasthali, a village, is ruled by some of the most powerful but corrupt leaders, a mysterious strangers shows up to end illegal practices and fulfil his comrade's wish.

programme.title: Himmatwar
programme.desc: Starring: Shruti K. Haasan,Vishal Krishna. Moneylender Vasu saves policeman Sivaraman. Catching gangster Singana Patrudu's eye, it sets off a dangerous chain of events for Vasu.

programme.title: Daringbaaz
programme.desc: Starring: Pawan Kalyan,Samantha. A billionaire's grandson, Gautham Nanda, desperately wants to reunite his mother & his grandfather.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Adam Don
programme.desc: Starring: Prithviraj Sukumaran,Narain. Adam rushes back to Scotland after his family's murder and baby Ila's kidnapping. With heartbreak fueling him, he dives into a suspense-filled hunt for answers, justice, and his child.

programme.title: Chatrapati
programme.desc: Starring: Bellamkonda Sai Sreenivas,Nushrat Bharucha. Separated by violence, a refugee searches for his foster family. But his toughest challenge isn't war-it's the betrayal by someone he once called brother.

programme.title: Baaghi
programme.desc: Baaghi

programme.title: Jai Ho
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Tabu. Jai leaves the army to inspire apathetic citizens. His movement catches fire, but a clash with an influential political family threatens everything he's built.

programme.title: Real Tevar
programme.desc: Starring: Aamani,Jagapathi Babu. Harsha, a millionaire's son, meets Charuseela and reaches a remote village, deciding to develop it, discovering purpose, love, responsibility, and values beyond wealth.

programme.title: Veera The Power
programme.desc: Starring: Vishal, Dimple Hayathi. Porus wants to be a cop, but his sister's death changes everything. Now, he hunts for justice with fierce determination-no badge, just grit.

programme.title: Vettaiyan The Hunter
programme.desc: Starring: Rajinikanth,Amitabh Bachchan. A Veteran cop, delivers swift justice to criminals. When a teacher is murdered, he races to find the killer while facing truth, guilt, and corruption.

programme.title: The Bhootnii
programme.desc: Starring: Sanjay Dutt,Sunny Singh. A ghost at St. Vincent's College manifests yearly at the Virgin Tree on Valentine's Day, turning a symbol of yearning into terror and compelling a para-physicist to investigate its sinister origins.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Johny Lever. A small-time contractor faces relentless corruption, political pressure, & personal humiliation while trying to complete honest road projects. His fight exposes the absurdities of a system

programme.title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Sonali Bendre. A joint Indian family faces trials as Ramkishen and Mamta raise their children. Mamta's ambition drives a division, but her sons oppose her, leading to family conflict and revelations.

programme.title: Sankranti Ko Anne Vaale Hai
programme.desc: Starring: Venkatesh,Aishwarya Rajesh. After a famous tech entrepreneur is kidnapped on her return to India, a police officer seeks help from her ex-boyfriend, a former cop now living a quiet family life.

programme.title: Khoonkhar
programme.desc: Starring: Bellamkonda Sreenivas,Rakul Preet Singh. Gagan and Sweety fall in love but are forced to break up because her father disapproves of him. While defending a family from thugs one day, Gagan unknowingly saves Sweety and vows to protect her.

programme.title: Skanda
programme.desc: Starring: Ram Pothineni,Sreeleela. Renowned for martial arts, a young man is recruited by a secret agency. His mission: confront terrorists, face danger, and fight bravely to safeguard peace and innocent lives.

programme.title: Attack
programme.desc: Starring: Manchu Manoj,Jagapati Babu. Guru Raj, a powerful businessman, is killed and one of his three sons, Kaali, vows to find the culprit. When he is also killed, Radha, Kaali's brother, vows to uncover the killer and exact revenge.

programme.title: Dosti Dushmani
programme.desc: Sandeep, Ranjit and Prakash are best friends since childhood. A misunderstanding between Ranjit and Sandeep leads the former to believe that the latter is a criminal. Can Prakash solve this problem?

programme.title: Shehzada
programme.desc: Bantu, despised by his father Valmiki, discovers his true parents, the Jindals, and strives to win their affection while protecting them from threats.

programme.title: Abhinetri
programme.desc: Shekhar, a young scientist, falls in love with Anjana, a dancer, and marries her. Differences separate the couple but when Shekhar's mother visits, they are forced to unite again.

programme.title: Love In Tokyo
programme.desc: An orphaned boy meets a runaway girl in Tokyo, both seeking to escape their respective predicaments. Their bond grows, but their pasts threaten to tear them apart in a tale of escape.

programme.title: Lav Kush
programme.desc: Ram made a choice, and Sitaji had to leave. Their sons then started a difficult journey. The family faced hard times and a lot of problems.

programme.title: Ek Hi Bhool
programme.desc: Sadhana and Ramkumar's marriage faces growing tension. Her family urges her to work things out, but will she be able to overcome her differences with her husband and find happiness?

programme.title: Main Aur Mera Haathi
programme.desc: Ram swears vengeance against Teja after he is framed and imprisoned for a crime he did not commit. After he is released from prison, Ram befriends an elephant who helps him in his quest.

programme.title: Jeevan Mrityu
programme.desc: An honest bank manager is arrested for embezzlement. After his release, he takes revenge on his colleagues who falsely implicated him.

programme.title: Samadhi
programme.desc: Lakhan Singh and his gang are known for their notoriety in the village. During one such raid he meets Champa and falls in love with her.

programme.title: Shagird
programme.desc: Professor Brij, who is sworn to bachelorhood, mentors Ramesh, who wants to be just like him. However, when the professor falls for Poonam, he faces a dilemma.

programme.title: Khushboo
programme.desc: Kusum and Brindavan love each other, and decide to marry when they grow up. But fate has other plans, both are separated. Years later they meet again.

programme.title: Dayyan
